rationale: No direct conflict. This section governs teacher designation systems and references the teacher incentive allotment under Section 48.112. The homestead exemption increase indirectly affects school district property tax revenue, but this section contains no operative language tied to homestead exemptions or property tax values.
quote: The agency shall periodically conduct evaluations of the effectiveness of the local optional teacher designation systems under this section and the teacher incentive allotment under Section 48.112 and report the results of the evaluations to the legislature.
_note: Indirect fiscal linkage exists through school funding formulas, but no operative text in this section references homestead exemptions or property tax revenue.
